steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the different locations of the two rivers — Africa vs. Asia.

steps.title: Choose the answer that emphasizes location
steps.content:
The matching choice directly states both locations (“The Niger River is in Africa, whereas the Indus River is located in Asia”) and uses “whereas” to highlight the contrast.

The other choices focus on length, ranking, or only one river instead.

This matches the correct answer — B is correct.
